content.content:
Done — I scheduled the Follow-up Meeting for 2024-05-19 from 11:30 to 12:30. Description: "Discuss action items and next steps from the Project Kick-off. Brief updates and assign owners."

Notes:
- 10:00 was already taken by the Project Kick-off (10:00–11:00).
- I scheduled the meeting at the next available slot that day (11:30–12:30).
- Participants: you (emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com). If you'd like me to add others, change the time, or include a location, tell me who and what to update.
